metrics.name: academorix.versioning.resolution.total
metrics.description: surface: rest/webhook/graphql. hit: true when resolver returned a version; false when fell through to next resolver.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.resolution.duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end resolution time. Should stay < 5ms P99 (cached lookups).

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.deprecated_version.usage_total
metrics.description: Every request that resolved to a deprecated version. This is the SIGNAL for migration progress — falling to zero means the version is safe to sunset.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.sunset_version.hits_total
metrics.description: Every request that hit a sunset version + received 410 Gone. Anomalously non-zero means customers didn't get the memo.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.transformers.applied_total
metrics.description: Each transformer application in a chain. Chain of 3 transformers = 3 increments.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.transformers.chain_length
metrics.description: Distribution of chain lengths applied. Long chains signal drift — need to consolidate versions.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.transformers.missing_total
metrics.description: Every failed chain resolution. Pages ops when > 0 for released → deprecated version pairs with active subscribers.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.subscriptions.by_version_gauge
metrics.description: How many active WebhookSubscriptions pin each version. Sampled hourly. Drives the sunset-readiness dashboard.

metrics.name: academorix.versioning.sunset.upgrade_total
metrics.description: outcome: upgraded / paused. Auto-upgrade success + fallback pauses.
